components.purpose: Define V2_19 as real-market risk analysis plan only; no live read is executed in this phase.
Plan future readonly market sources such as provider health, latency, mempool, quote freshness, and risk snapshots.
Future provider calls must be read-only, budgeted, bounded, logged, and explicitly approved before real read.
Plan snapshot fields for latency bucket, quote age, pending tx pressure, reorg/provider risk, mempool pressure, and confidence score.
Bind V2_18C_FIX1 formula to future readonly snapshots without granting execution authority.
Detect provider degraded, stale quote, reorg, mempool congestion, and hard-cap conditions as alert-only outputs.
Plan green/yellow/red latency handling while preserving hot path wait zero.
Classify congestion as risk signal, not trade permission.
Reject stale snapshots and mark WAIT_FRESH_BUNDLE without blocking hot path execution loops.
Hard cap and provider degraded cannot be bypassed by opportunity, confidence, AI, or human convenience.
Plan evidence references for future real-market risk snapshots without writing live DB in this phase.
Plan future panel/readmodel display of risk map as observer-only, not executor.
Keep microsecond performance claims false until separate production benchmark evidence exists.
Trade, wallet, paper, live execution, and auto-apply remain zero.

conditions: V2_19 plan phase performs no real provider, API, RPC, explorer, Telegram, Discord, or external fetch.
Future real-market readonly read requires separate explicit approval.
EffectiveBackpressure formula may be bound only to snapshot fields.
Snapshot fields must be O(1) and bounded.
Hard cap is non-overridable.
Provider degraded is non-overridable RED.
Opportunity or confidence cannot bypass RED.
Outputs are risk classifications, not trade permissions.
Panel/readmodel can display risk state only after separate apply approval.
DB schema/write is forbidden in this plan phase.
DB and panel SHA must remain unchanged.
Trade, wallet, paper, live execution remain disabled.
AI may summarize later but cannot decide, override, or trade.
Hot path wait count target remains zero.
Real sleep count target remains zero.
Microsecond performance claim remains false.
Production benchmark remains separate future proof.
Evidence references must be versioned and auditable.
Old V2_18 fail artifacts must remain absent.
Next phase must be TempDB dry-run before any real readonly fetch.
goal: Plan readonly real-market risk analysis using V2_18C_FIX1 backpressure discipline and V2_18D replay evidence.

risk_outputs.meaning: Clean enough snapshot; observation allowed only.
Signal can be watched but requires friction/risk note.
Hard block or degraded provider alert; no execution.
Snapshot stale or skewed; wait for fresh evidence.
Latency/jitter spike produces risk classification only.
Reorg risk is alert-only and hard-cap eligible.
Human review may see evidence but cannot auto-execute.
